title: Cobblemon: Hunters
description: Just a modpack for me n my friends, but if you'd like to use it that's alright! It has some adventure/exploration based mods and a couple QoL mods to go with Cobblemon as well!
body:
I made this modpack for me and my friends and wanted a way for them to access updates to it without having to send them the modpack every time.

That being said, feel free to use it if you'd like! It's a relatively simple modpack that doesn't add any Cobblemon not featured in the base mod, but does add features such as hostile Pokemon, a chaining system for increasing shiny odds, and other neat details. Many of the mods added outside of Cobblemon are there to incentivize exploration. The terrain and biomes you encounter are heavily modified by Terralith, without straying too far from what you'd expect in vanilla. Lots of new structures and points of interest to find, as well as revamps for many of Minecraft's existing structures. To help ease the process of traveling, there are a couple of mods that make aspects of your journey easier, such as backpacks and waystones.
On your travels, use the Exposure mod to take photos of landscapes and exciting finds! With joy of Painting, create your own paintings, with easels to help you get into that artistic vibe! Not a fan of the music that plays as you wander, whether its vanilla music or the many tracks added by The Immersive Music Mod? Simple, craft your own instruments and play whatever you'd like with the Immersive Melodies mod.

The mod does use Essential to connect with friends, but of course you don't have to if that's not your style. If you are adventuring with your friends, the Simple Voice Chat mod will help connect your voices!
